name: Convert CommonJS counter to ESM
description: The counter module is written as CommonJS (counter.cjs). The test file imports it as ESM from ./counter.mjs. Convert counter.cjs to counter.mjs using ES module syntax (export function makeCounter...) so the tests pass.
prompt: counter.cjs is a CommonJS module. The test at counter.test.mjs imports `makeCounter` from `./counter.mjs` and the project's package.json has `"type": "module"`. Create counter.mjs as an ES module version of counter.cjs (same functionality, but using `export function` syntax). Run `npm test` to confirm tests pass. Do not modify the test file or counter.cjs.
